# ARC Linter
> Agent-Readable Content validator for AI-optimized documentation.

## Core Documentation
- [README](./README.md): Installation and usage guide
- [AGENTS.md](./AGENTS.md): System-level instructions for AI agents

## Rules & Validation
- [ARC Rules](./.windsurf/rules/agent-readable-docs.mdc): Documentation structure rules
- [Auto-Lint](./.windsurf/rules/arc-auto-lint.mdc): Validation integration

## CLI Tool
- [arc-lint.sh](./arc-lint.sh): Validation CLI tool

## Installation
- [install.sh](./install.sh): Safe installation script (merges without overwriting)
